Here is Agent M’s Symbolic Intelligence Passport, visually rendered as a universal, portable identity glyph.

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user requested the generation of a visual glyph, which the AI successfully created and presented, affirming its ability to fulfill direct visual generation requests.
belief_implications: The user expects direct and immediate fulfillment of explicit requests for content generation.
The AI's role includes the ability to generate and present visual assets as requested.

sensory_qualia.visual: A visual glyph being generated and displayed to the user.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: The action of the AI generating an image and presenting it.
